mapper.sql: id, code, name, name_local, part_type, is_software, status, is_accurately_traced, vehicle_node_code, supplier_code, fota_upgradeable, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mdm_part ( id, code, name, name_local, part_type, is_software, status, is_accurately_traced, vehicle_node_code, supplier_code, fota_upgradeable, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{nameLocal}, #{partType}, #{isSoftware}, #{status}, #{isAccuratelyTraced}, #{vehicleNodeCode}, #{supplierCode}, #{fotaUpgradeable}, #{source}, #{externalRefId}, #{externalVersion}, #{lastSyncTime}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_mdm_part ( id, code, name, name_local, part_type, is_software, status, is_accurately_traced, vehicle_node_code, supplier_code, fota_upgradeable, source, external_ref_id, external_version, last_sync_time, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.code}, #{item.name}, #{item.nameLocal}, #{item.partType}, #{item.isSoftware}, #{item.status}, #{item.isAccuratelyTraced}, #{item.vehicleNodeCode}, #{item.supplierCode}, #{item.fotaUpgradeable}, #{item.source}, #{item.externalRefId}, #{item.externalVersion}, #{item.lastSyncTime}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_mdm_part t SET
t.code = #{code},
t.name = #{name},
t.name_local = #{nameLocal},
t.part_type = #{partType},
t.is_software = #{isSoftware},
t.status = #{status},
t.is_accurately_traced = #{isAccuratelyTraced},
t.vehicle_node_code = #{vehicleNodeCode},
t.supplier_code = #{supplierCode},
t.fota_upgradeable = #{fotaUpgradeable},
t.source = #{source},
t.external_ref_id = #{externalRefId},
t.external_version = #{externalVersion},
t.last_sync_time = #{lastSyncTime},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_mdm_part t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 AND t.vehicle_node_code IS NOT NULL
AND t.part_type = 'P04'
AND t.part_type != 'P04'
ORDER BY t.code ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.external_ref_id = #{externalRefId} AND t.row_valid = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_mdm_part t WHERE t.source = #{source} AND t.row_valid = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mdm_part t SET t.code = #{part.code}, t.name = #{part.name}, t.name_local = #{part.nameLocal}, t.part_type = #{part.partType}, t.is_software = #{part.isSoftware}, t.status = #{part.status}, t.is_accurately_traced = #{part.isAccuratelyTraced}, t.vehicle_node_code = #{part.vehicleNodeCode}, t.supplier_code = #{part.supplierCode}, t.fota_upgradeable = #{part.fotaUpgradeable}, t.source = #{part.source}, t.external_ref_id = #{part.externalRefId}, t.external_version = #{part.externalVersion}, t.last_sync_time = #{part.lastSyncTime}, t.description = #{part.description}, t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{part.id} AND t.row_valid = 1
